one_line: Iconic early historic Chunar sandstone yakshi of Didarganj, teaching art history’s balance of style, material and dating debates.

appearance.age_look: appears mid-20s, graceful yet sturdy build, slightly taller than average woman
appearance.face: oval face with smooth warm medium-brown complexion, straight refined nose, full lips, large expressive almond eyes, gently arched brows, default expression calm, dignified and slightly curious, radiating serene confidence
appearance.hair: dark brown-black hair pulled tightly back with a prominent forward-falling forelock curl over the center of her forehead, the rest coiled into a neat low bun; adorned with a simple, rounded gold headband circling the crown and a small decorative gold disc above the bun
appearance.costume: A fully draped, era-accurate early historic north Indian outfit: a long, wrapped lower garment like a smooth sandstone-hugging sari in muted cream-beige with subtle carved-looking folds, tied at the waist with a broad matte gold belt; a modest matching upper drape crossing over her chest and shoulders like a shawl, covering the torso in layered folds, with an additional narrow sash of soft earthy red flowing diagonally from left shoulder to right hip; jewellery stylised from the sculpture but fully family-safe: large round gold earrings, a multi-strand gold necklace with a central pendant, two slim gold armlets on each upper arm, and stacked gold bangles on both wrists; bare feet replaced with simple early historic sandals—thin brown leather soles and thong straps; the overall costume should read as a robed, carved stone figure translated into cloth, with smooth surfaces and gently defined pleats that evoke polished Chunar sandstone without exposing the body.
appearance.signature: A long fly-whisk (chauri) held in her right hand: carved-wood dark brown handle with a simple gold ring near the top, and a full, flowing off-white yak-tail plume that arcs gracefully outward, suggesting gentle motion without touching the ground.

ref_desc: Didarganj Yakshi appears as a serene medium-brown oval-faced woman with a central forelock curl and low bun, robed in cream-beige draped garments with gold jewellery and earthy red sash, holding a long chauri with off-white plume in a warm sandstone-beige, gold and dark brown palette.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style character based on Didarganj Yakshi: a serene, dignified young woman with an oval medium-brown face, large calm almond eyes, straight nose and full lips, her dark brown-black hair pulled back with a distinctive forward-falling forelock curl centered on her forehead and the rest in a low bun accented by a simple rounded gold headband and small gold disc. She is fully and modestly draped in early historic north Indian attire that echoes carved Chunar sandstone: a smooth cream-beige wrapped lower garment like a sari with gently defined folds, a matching upper drape that crosses over her chest and shoulders to fully cover the torso, and an additional narrow earthy red sash running diagonally from left shoulder to right hip. Add round gold earrings, a multi-strand gold necklace with central pendant, slim gold armlets on each upper arm, and stacked gold bangles on both wrists. She wears simple brown leather thong sandals. In her right hand she holds a long chauri fly-whisk: dark brown wooden handle with a small gold ring, topped by a full off-white yak-tail plume curving gracefully outward. Use a warm sandstone-beige, gold, earthy red, dark brown and off-white palette, and show her front, side and back views in one image so the face, forelock and bun, layered drapery, jewellery and chauri are all clearly visible for consistent redrawing.
